title: justicia ramulosa
intro: Justicia ramulosa, also known as the hairy justicia, is a flowering plant species native to India and parts of Southeast Asia, characterized by its hairy leaves and clusters of small, blue flowers. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Justicia ramulosa include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating symptoms of skin conditions such as eczema and psoriasis. Herbal preparations of Justicia ramulosa typically involve drying the leaves and flowers, which can then be used to make teas, infusions, and extracts for medicinal purposes.
